data.title: Secure Data Encryption
data.description: All sensitive data is encrypted both at rest and in transit to ensure data protection.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption and TLS 1.3 for data communication.

data.title: Multi-factor Authentication
data.description: User accounts are protected using multi-factor authentication to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Supports TOTP and SMS-based verification protocols.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security audits and penetration testing are conducted to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes tools like Nessus and Burp Suite for security testing.

data.title: Firewall and Intrusion Detection
data.description: Advanced firewall policies and an intrusion detection system monitor and mitigate potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Employs AWS WAF and Snort for intrusion detection.

data.title: Role-based Access Control
data.description: Enforces strict role-based access permissions to limit access to sensitive resources.
data.technical_spec: Implemented via IAM roles and policy development.
